9th February, 2007 Statutory Instruments
•
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
STATUTORY INSTRUMENT No. 21 OF 2007
The Value Added Tax
(Laws, Volume 19, Cap, 331)
The Value Added Tax (General) (Amendment)
Regulations, 2007
IN EXERCISE of the powers contained in Sections two, eighteen
andf ifty-one of the Value Added Tax Act, the following Regulations
are hereby made:
I. {I) These Regulations may be cited as the Value Added Tax Title and
(General) (Amendment) Regulations, 2007, and shall be read as commencement
one with the Value Added Tax (General) Regulations in these Cap. 331
Regulations referred to as the principal Regulations.
(2) These Regulations shall come into operation on l 0th
February, 2007.

regulation 8B
SB. Twenty per centum of the tax charged on the supply Claim of tax
of petrol to a taxable supplier may be included as a claim, on supply of
petrol
deduction or credit under section eighteen oft he Act, except
that where the supply is for resale, one hundred per centum
oft he tax charged may be included as a claim, deduction or
credit.
